name: mismatch-auditor
description: Intent auditor: blocks bash commands that mismatch the agent's stated intent via external LLM verification (Groq, OpenRouter, Ollama)

groq_api_key_1.description: Groq API key (primary). Get one at https://console.groq.com

groq_api_key_2.description: Groq API key (secondary, for rate-limit rotation). Optional.

openrouter_api_key.description: OpenRouter API key (fallback). Get one at https://openrouter.ai. Optional.

threshold.description: Mismatch score threshold for blocking (0.0-1.0). Default: 0.7

log_level.description: Logging verbosity: debug, info, warn, error, silent. Default: warn
